name: Fields

subprograms.name: Head

documentation.description:
The start of a Container starting at Separator, counting Pos from start.
Separator obviously not included.

subprograms.name: Slice

documentation.description: If Ini or Fin don't appear in the matching position, empty result.

subprograms.name: Tail

documentation.description:
The remainder of a Container starting at Separator, counting Pos from end.
Separator obviously not included.

formals.name: Append
